chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1641 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6452/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate along with Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Syed Yar Ali Shah, Deputy Director (E&I) Board of Revenue, Regional Revenue Office, Larkana on behalf of Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, Irslan Hyder, Assistant Commissioner Khairpur and Hussain Ali, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< In compliance of order dated 11.11.2025, learned Additional AG files reply of Show Cause Notice of Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh Hyderabad and compliance report on behalf of Respondent No.2, which are taken on record. Perusal of the compliance report as well as reply of the show cause notices reflect that the necessary notifications have been issued, thereafter Award has also been passed. The show cause notice issued to Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh Hyderabad in terms of order dated 11.11.2025 is vacated. Under the above circumstances, this Petition has become infructuous and is hereby disposed of along with listed application. If the grievance of the petitioner is not redressed, he would be at liberty to approach the appropriate forum. Judge Judge ARBROHI
